query: SELECT b.id, b.name, u.username, u.email FROM branches b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.id = u.branchId AND u.role = 'branch_manager' WHERE b.name LIKE '%BAĞCILAR%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT b.id, b.name, u.username, u.email FROM branches b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.id = u.branchId AND u.role = 'branch_manager' WHERE b.name LIKE '%BAĞCILAR%';
